creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text:
I am trying to figure out whether it is my setup or something else not using ld.bfd:
root@bsd1srv1j:/usr/ports/shells/bash # make -V LD
ld
root@bsd1srv1j:/usr/ports/shells/bash # make -V LLD_UNSAFE
yes
root@bsd1srv1j:/usr/ports/shells/bash # make -V LDFLAGS
 -fstack-protector-strong
